info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Templates Validations and Refresh. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub.

tags.name: Account Template
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Templates at account laevel.

tags.name: Org Template
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Templates at org laevel.

tags.name: Project Template
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Templates at project laevel.

post.description: Creates a Template in the Account scope.

parameters.name: is_stable
parameters.description: True if given version for template to be set as stable

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Specify comment with respect to changes

value.name: Example_template
value.yaml:
template:
  name: sup
  identifier: sup
  versionLabel: v1
  type: Stage
  tags: {}
  spec:
    type: Custom
    spec:
      execution:
        steps:
          - step:
              type: ShellScript
              name: ss1
              identifier: ss1
              spec:
                shell: Bash
                onDelegate: true
                source:
                  type: Inline
                  spec:
                    script: exit 1
                environmentVariables: []
                outputVariables: []
              timeout: 10m
